forgot.title: Reset password

landing.metaTitle: RAW English — Make It Well Done
landing.metaDescription: Gamified English lessons that don't feel like school. XP, streaks, 37 achievements, speaking clubs and 1-on-1 sessions. Take your English from raw to well done.

hero.headline: Grill your English
hero.subheadline: From Raw to Well Done: 1-on-1 lessons, speaking clubs, XP and streaks. No fluff.

pricing.desc: You pay for lessons from your balance. Gamification, clubs and prizes come with the Raw Pro plan. Zero hidden fees, zero surprise charges.
pricing.topupDesc: One 1-on-1 lesson = 50 minutes with a teacher. The bigger you top up, the cheaper each lesson gets.
pricing.subscriptionDesc: The subscription unlocks Speaking Clubs, gamification, achievements, the leaderboard and your AI study plan. Lessons are billed separately, from your balance.
pricing.footerMid: you can still book 1-on-1 lessons. Speaking Clubs, gamification, achievements, the leaderboard, your AI plan and the community come with
pricing.footerEnd: only. The subscription doesn't include lesson costs.

shell.verifyEmailBody: We sent you a link. Check your inbox to claim the signup XP.

home.title: Home
home.todayEmpty: No lessons today — great day to book one
home.weekEmpty: No lessons in the next week. Grab the next slot 👆

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: An extra code from an authenticator app at sign-in. Protects your account even if your password leaks.
mfa.requiredBanner: Two-factor authentication is required for admins. Set up TOTP to return to the admin panel.
mfa.unverifiedDesc: Not verified — remove it and try again
mfa.connectDesc: Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, Raivo — any authenticator app
mfa.step2: 2. Scan the QR code or type the secret manually
mfa.step3: 3. Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app
mfa.secretHint: Secret (in case QR is not readable):
mfa.errorInvalidCode: Invalid code — check the device clock is in sync

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Manage your Raw Pro plan
subscription.cancelSubscriptionDesc: Access stays until the end of the paid period

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: Irreversible account actions
danger.exportDataDesc: Download all of your data: lessons, XP, achievements
danger.resetProgressDesc: Zero out XP, streaks, and achievements. Lessons are kept.
danger.deleteAccountDesc: All data will be erased permanently. Balance is not refunded.

telegramModal.title: 📱 Connect Telegram
telegramModal.desc: Receive notifications about lessons, clubs, requests, and support straight in Telegram. Code is valid for 10 minutes.
telegramModal.step1: 1. Open the bot using the button above
telegramModal.step3: 3. The window will close automatically — you will get a greeting
telegramModal.waiting: Waiting for the bot to confirm…

toasts.tgRedirectGoogle: Redirecting to Google — use the same email you have here

balance.subtitle: Manage your account and subscription
balance.proSoon: Raw Pro subscription is coming soon. We're wiring up Yookassa right now.
balance.label: Balance
balance.topUpHint: Top up to pay for lessons
balance.cancelSubInfo: To cancel your subscription, message support.
balance.noSubBlurb: Without a subscription you can only book lessons with teachers. Speaking Clubs, gamification, achievements, prizes, leaderboard, AI plan and community — all only with Raw Pro. The subscription doesn't include lesson cost — those are paid separately from your balance.

referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.heroSub: Your friend gets +50 XP and a free trial lesson, you get +100 XP after their first lesson
referrals.linkUnavailable: Link isn't ready yet. Refresh in a minute.
referrals.copyFailed: Couldn't copy. Select the link manually.
referrals.shareText: Join me on Raw English — level up your English and get +50 XP on signup 🎁
referrals.step1Text: Send a friend your personal referral link
referrals.emptyTitle: Nobody has signed up via your link yet

support.subtitle: Drop us a line if something is broken or you need advice. We reply within one business day.
support.emptyThreadsStudent: No tickets yet. Create one to reach out to student support.
support.emptyThreadsTeacher: No tickets yet. Create one to reach out to teacher support.
support.blankBody: Open an existing ticket on the left or create a new one to start chatting with our support team.
support.composerClosed: This ticket is closed. Create a new one to continue.
support.modalSub: Describe the issue in as much detail as possible — that helps us reply faster and more accurately.
support.subjectPlaceholder: For example: cannot book a lesson
support.bodyPlaceholder: What happened, what have you tried, what did you expect?

summaries.subtitle: Automatic recaps of your lessons
summaries.emptyTitle: AI summaries will show up after your first lesson
summaries.quizTitle: Lesson quiz ({count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}})

home.title: Home
home.loadFailedBody: Looks like a temporary database hiccup. Refresh in a minute — if it keeps happening, ping support.
home.weekEmpty: No lessons in the next week.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Lessons and available slots
schedule.availabilityHint: Mark when you're available — students will book themselves
schedule.errorAuthMissing: Couldn't identify your user. Please sign in again.
schedule.errorTeacherProfileMissing: Teacher profile not found. Contact an administrator.
schedule.emptyWeek: No lessons this week. Schedule one with the button above ↑
schedule.modalDefaultHint: Your students will appear here. Or type a name / email to search.
schedule.toastNoPast: Cannot schedule a lesson in the past
schedule.toastSlotTaken: Slot is taken. Pick another time.
schedule.toastSuccess: Lesson assigned. The student has been notified about payment.
schedule.availUnsavedBody: Toggle the days you want and click «💾 Save» on the top right. Until you save, students don't see any free slots and can't book you.
schedule.blockBody: Pick a date you can't teach on. All slots that day will be unavailable for booking.

students.addStudentToastDesc: Adding students will be available shortly.
students.emptyTitleNone: You don't have any students yet
students.emptyDescNone: Students will appear here after your first lesson together.
students.emptyDescNoMatch: Try changing the filters or search.

studentDetail.materialsEmpty: You haven't shared any materials with this student yet

profile.subtitle: Fill in your info — students see it in the teacher catalog and on the booking page.
profile.personalSub: Your first and last name are shown to students when they book a lesson.
profile.aboutSub: Students see this text in the catalog and the booking modal. Be specific — who you are, how you teach, who it's for.
profile.bioPlaceholder: For example: I teach adults from A1, prep students for IELTS, and run conversation clubs on Wednesdays…
profile.specsSub: Pick up to 8. Students filter the catalog by these.
profile.langsSub: At least one. Used to match trial-lesson requests.
profile.certsSub: One per line. For example: CELTA (2020), IELTS Trainer Course (2022).
profile.pricingSub: Hourly rate in rubles. Payments are off in the demo, but prices are visible to students in the catalog.
profile.visibilitySub: When off, your card is hidden from students and trial-lesson matching skips you.
profile.visibilityHint: You can turn this off temporarily if you're on vacation or have no open slots

payouts.nextInDays: in {count} {word} · automatic to your default card
payouts.studentsEmpty: No completed lessons this month yet
payouts.methodsEmpty: No payout methods set up. Open <link>Settings</link> to add a card or crypto wallet.
